title: The Mountain Route Narrows
description: On pages 17–19, the mountain route narrows as wapol learns that the Straw Hats are heading for Drum Castle, while Dalton and the villagers face the threat of the old tyrant’s return.
scene: The Mountain Route Narrows. Wapol learns that the Straw Hats are heading for Drum Castle, while Dalton and the villagers face the threat of the old tyrant’s return. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: We've come to a stop because the snow's too thick...

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: And it looks like we headed up the mountain...!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: those damn rabbits really did it...!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Please tell me I'm Drea- Ming.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just as long as it's far away from here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Because there's an avalanche headed right for us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: H-Here we go! F-Follow me, USOPP gallery Pirates!

summary: This part centers on the mountain route narrows, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
